seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Open-source flash-sized model optimized for small agentic loops and thousands of parallel tasks; open source nearly matching closed-source performance for agent workloads.
Harbor framework now supports LangSmith sandboxes as first-class env for longer-running, stateful agent evaluations; becoming industry standard alongside Daytona/E2B/Modal.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: AI research agent that analyzes entire fields, identifies research gaps, generates novel directions, and handles workflows like GPU selection and environment setup for reproducing papers.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Global reset of Codex rate limits across plans with banked resets rolling out.
near_misses.reason: Operational update rather than new technical innovation or framework.
